input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule S.3.10.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:

            TITLE: after review, the item may be added to the cost table with an appropriate cost.  it will then

            CONTENT:
            rule S.3.10.2: After review, the item may be added to the Cost Table with an appropriate cost.  It will then
S.3.10.2 After review, the item may be added to the Cost Table with an appropriate cost.  It will then 
be available to all teams.

final_answer: After review, the item may be added to the Cost Table with an appropriate cost. It will then be available to all teams.
